payload.query: FOR d IN $1 LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val < 50 AND d.stringField == 'type_A' LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val, stringField: d.stringField, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val < 50 AND d.stringField == 'type_A' LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val, stringField: d.stringField, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.nonStoredValue < 50 LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, nonStoredValue: d.nonStoredValue, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.nonStoredValue < 50 LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, nonStoredValue: d.nonStoredValue, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val >= 2 AND d.val <= 50 AND d.boolField == true AND d.floatField > 10.0 LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 10 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val, boolField: d.boolField, floatField: d.floatField, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val >= 2 AND d.val <= 50 AND d.boolField == true AND d.floatField > 10.0 LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 10 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val, boolField: d.boolField, floatField: d.floatField, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val >= 10 AND d.val <= 50 AND d.arrayField[0] > 2 AND d.objectField.nested == 1 LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val, arrayField: d.arrayField, objectField: d.objectField, dist}

LET rp = (FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val == $2 RETURN d.vector) FOR d IN $1 FILTER d.val >= 10 AND d.val <= 50 AND d.arrayField[0] > 2 AND d.objectField.nested == 1 LET dist = APPROX_NEAR_L2(FLATTEN(rp), d.vector) SORT dist LIMIT 5 RETURN {key: d._key, val: d.val, arrayField: d.arrayField, objectField: d.objectField, dist}
